articles.title: Finance Briefing: US Treasury Rout Tests Washington's Tolerance for Higher Borrowing Costs
articles.summary: A sharp decline in Treasury prices has sparked renewed debate over how much higher borrowing costs Washington can tolerate. The market’s reaction to rising yields, the transition in Fed leadership, and shifting inflation dynamics all converge to shape risk appetite and valuation in equities and fixed income. This artic

articles.title: Technology Briefing: AI-Driven Change and the Next Big Thing – PwC
articles.summary: This briefing examines how AI is reshaping technology platforms, infrastructure, and product strategy, drawing on recent insights from PwC, Google, and industry observers. It explores the shift to open AI ecosystems, the economics of cloud‑based AI, security concerns, and operational impacts across sectors.

articles.title: Technology Briefing: The Human Edge in an AI‑Driven World
articles.summary: This analysis explores how the rapid rise of AI tools reshapes platform strategies, cloud economics, security, and product design while keeping human cognition at the center.
